name: Erasca, Inc.
business: Erasca is a clinical-stage precision oncology company singularly focused on discovering, developing, and commercializing therapies for patients with RAS/MAPK pathway-driven cancers.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage precision oncology company singularly focused on discovering, developing, and commercializing therapies for patients with RAS/MAPK pathway-driven cancers.

catalysts.event: Phase 1 monotherapy data readout from AURORAS-1 and JYP0015M101 trials (ERAS-0015)
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate a Phase 1 monotherapy data readout from the AURORAS-1 and JYP0015M101 trials in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of monotherapy expansion cohorts and combination dose escalation cohorts as part of AURORAS-1 trial
catalysts.sentence: In addition, we anticipate the initiation of monotherapy expansion cohorts and combination dose escalation cohorts as part of the AURORAS-1 trial in the second half of 2026, with associated data readouts planned for 2027.

catalysts.event: Phase 1 monotherapy data readout from BOREALIS-1 trial (ERAS-4001)
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate a Phase 1 monotherapy data readout from the BOREALIS-1 trial in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of monotherapy expansion cohorts and combination dose escalation cohorts for ERAS-4001
catalysts.sentence: In addition, we anticipate the initiation of monotherapy expansion cohorts and combination dose escalation cohorts in 2027.

tamClaims.claim: More than five million new patients diagnosed globally per year with cancers driven by RAS/MAPK pathway molecular alterations
tamClaims.sentence: Of the more than five million new patients diagnosed globally per year with cancers driven by RAS/MAPK pathway molecular alterations, most have limited or no targeted therapy treatment options.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 2.7 million patients diagnosed annually worldwide with RAS-mutant tumors
tamClaims.sentence: We believe ERAS-0015 has the potential to address unmet medical needs in approximately 2.7 million patients who are diagnosed annually worldwide with RAS-mutant tumors, including the more than 2.2 million patients with KRAS-mutant tumors whom ERAS-4001 could also address.

tamClaims.claim: More than 2.2 million patients with KRAS-mutant tumors annually
tamClaims.sentence: We believe ERAS-0015 has the potential to address unmet medical needs in approximately 2.7 million patients who are diagnosed annually worldwide with RAS-mutant tumors, including the more than 2.2 million patients with KRAS-mutant tumors whom ERAS-4001 could also address.
